pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Source)<-[r0:USING]-(m0:Tweet) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.name ASC LIMIT 3

gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.betweenness > 1000000 RETURN u.screen_name, u.betweenness
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name WHERE n.betweenness > 1000000

gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:POSTS]->(t:Tweet) WITH u, count(t) AS tweet_count ORDER BY tweet_count DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN u.screen_name AS screen_name, tweet_count
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:POSTS]-(m0:Tweet) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.screen_name ORDER BY n.followers DESC LIMIT 3

gold_cypher: MATCH (me:Me {screen_name: 'neo4j'})-[:POSTS]->(retweet:Tweet)-[:RETWEETS]->(original:Tweet)-[:TAGS]->(hashtag:Hashtag) RETURN hashtag.name AS hashtag, COUNT(*) AS usage_count ORDER BY usage_count DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Hashtag)<-[r0:TAGS]-(m0:Tweet)-[r1:RETWEETS]->(m1:Tweet {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.name ASC LIMIT 5

gold_cypher: MATCH (me:Me {screen_name: 'neo4j'})-[:FOLLOWS]->(u:User) WHERE u.followers > 10000 RETURN u.screen_name, u.followers
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:FOLLOWS]->(m0:User {name: 'neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.followers > 10000 RETURN n.name

gold_cypher: MATCH (t:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(u:User) WITH t, size(collect(u)) AS mentioned_users WHERE mentioned_users > 3 MATCH (t)-[:USING]->(s:Source) RETURN DISTINCT s.name AS source_name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Source)<-[r0:Tweet]-(m0:User) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE count(DISTINCT m0) > 3 RETURN n.name

gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:FOLLOWS]->(m:Me {name: 'Neo4j'}) WHERE u.profile_image_url IS NOT NULL RETURN u LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:profile_image_url]->(m0:Node {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.name LIMIT 3

gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User {name: "Neo4j"})-[:POSTS]->(t:Tweet) WHERE EXISTS((t)-[:CONTAINS]->(:Link)) WITH t MATCH (t)-[:TAGS]->(h:Hashtag) RETURN h.name AS hashtag
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Hashtag)<-[r0:TAGS]-(m0:Tweet)-[r1:CONTAINS]->(m1:Link {url: 'https://t.co/JSIaZFJEaE'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.name IS NOT NULL RETURN n.name

gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User {name: "Neo4j"})-[:POSTS]->(t:Tweet) RETURN t.text ORDER BY t.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tweet)<-[r0:POSTS]-(m0:User {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.id ORDER BY n.created_at DESC LIMIT 1

gold_cypher: MATCH (neo4j:User {screen_name: 'neo4j'})<-[:FOLLOWS]-(follower:User) WITH avg(follower.followers) AS average_followers RETURN average_followers
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:FOLLOWS]->(m0:User {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN avg(n.followers)
